name: woodbury-ext-automat
description: Assemble and render videos from JSON project files using headless Blender VSE

woodbury.name: automat
woodbury.description: Assemble images, videos, audio, and text into rendered videos using Blender's Video Sequence Editor in headless mode. Driven by JSON project files designed to be generated by an LLM.

BLENDER_PATH.description: Path to Blender executable. Auto-detected if not set.

AUTOMAT_DIR.description: Path to the blender-automat project directory (containing automat_render.py)

VIDEO_OUTPUT_DIR.description: Default output directory for rendered videos. Defaults to working directory.
